description:
In ProxyController.proxy_image_fetch(), after validate_proxy_url() passes, the code creates a new HTTP::Client directly from the raw URL string without re-validating the redirect destination. This bypasses domain validation for redirects.

Additionally, there is no approved domain list that could be used for quickhea-kim since we have over 200 feeds. The current validation relies only on ALLOWED_PROXY_DOMAINS constant but doesn't enforce it consistently on redirects.

Expected: All proxy image fetches (including redirects) should be validated against the allowed domain list.

Code location: src/controllers/proxy_controller.cr - proxy_image_fetch() method
title: Bug: ProxyController redirect URL validation gap
